seoTitle: Thomas Plain vs Thorngate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Thomas Plain and Thorngate. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Thomas Plain vs Thorngate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thomas Plain and Thorngate.
heading: Thomas Plain vs Thorngate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thomas Plain, South Australia and Thorngate, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thorngate has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Thomas Plain (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thomas Plain or Thorngate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thomas Plain has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Thorngate scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thomas Plain scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Thorngate scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thomas Plain or Thorngate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thorngate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
